# buildScripts/createApp: remove the questions to select main thread addons & useServiceWorker

these questions are not clear at all for first-time users.

i will keep the program options to specify them, but remove the questions for a better developer experience. assuming that devs who do specify program options inside the terminal know what they are doing.
